channel.title: Msi Afterburner on ExitCode0
channel.description: Recent content in Msi Afterburner on ExitCode0

item.title: RTX 3060 Nicehash mining overclock settings
item.description: Achieve 44+ MH/s on an RTX 3060 with Nicehash overclocking. Core clock reduction and memory overclock settings in MSI Afterburner for maximum Ethereum mining hash rate.
